creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/uses-fakeroot.html 
refers to http://fakeroot.alioth.debian.org which does not exist.

And in the rendering there is no space between the URL and the next word:
  http://fakeroot.alioth.debian.org/for 

The latter can be easily fixed by omitting the slash, i.e., replacing it
with a space (since top-level URLs do not need a trailing slash and the
actual link does not feature one) - but of course the link also is broken.
